hero.label: Enterprise Software Products
hero.heading: Intelligent Products That Transform Operations
hero.description: From ERP platforms to AI voice agents and CRM systems, our products automate the work behind your business, cut operating cost, and deploy inside your stack in days and not quarters.

showcase.label: Our Products
showcase.description: Ten products, one secure platform. Switch between them to see what each does, its six core capabilities, and how fast it ships.

products.title: Cortex Voiz: AI Solution
products.subtitle: Production-quality AI voice agents for inbound and outbound calls without building telephony infrastructure from scratch.
products.description: Manual phone handling is costly and hard to scale. Create, configure, and manage intelligent voice agents from one dashboard — whether you run a clinic, a bank, or a contact centre.
products.demoText: Watch the 2-min demo — no form needed

features.title: Intelligent Inbound & Outbound Calling
features.subtitle: Automate your sales outreach and customer support.

features.title: Actionable Insights & Summaries
features.subtitle: Every completed phone call automatically generates a full searchable transcript

features.title: Knowledge-Driven Responses (RAG)
features.subtitle: Ground your AI's knowledge in your actual business data.

features.title: Multilingual Capabilities
features.subtitle: Serve a global customer base effortlessly.

features.title: Risk-Free Browser Live Testing
features.subtitle: Perfect your agent's behavior before going live.

features.title: Seamless CRM & API Integration
features.subtitle: A robust REST API allowing seamless integration with your existing external applications and CRMs

performance.heading: Built for Scale and Performance
performance.description: Cortex Voiz is engineered for ultra-low latency voice interactions. It integrates directly with industry-leading telephony providers like Twilio and Plivo and uses a high-performance Python (FastAPI) orchestration layer to stream real-time audio directly to the Google Gemini Live WebSocket API

products.title: Cortex Insight: AI Solution
products.subtitle: Deploy AI-driven surveys that adapt to user responses in real-time.
products.description: Gathering market intelligence is slow. Our tool engages respondents naturally, asking follow-up questions based on their answers, delivering deeper insights faster than static forms.
products.demoText: Watch the 2-min demo — no form needed

platform.label: Built for Scale and Performance
platform.heading: One Secure Platform Behind Every Product
platform.description: Every CortexCraft product runs on the same hardened platform — low-latency, integration-ready, and audit-friendly from day one, so it drops into your environment instead of fighting it.

features.title: Latency
features.description: Sub-second turn-taking on live calls via a streaming WebSocket pipeline.

features.title: Integrations
features.description: Native connectors and a clean REST API into your CRMs, ERPs, and data stores.

features.title: Orchestration
features.description: A FastAPI layer streaming audio to real-time speech and reasoning models.

features.title: Security
features.description: Encrypted in transit and at rest, with role-based access and full call audit logs.

demo.label: Test It Yourself
demo.heading: Talk To Cortex Voiz & Test Your Own Scenario
demo.description: Pick a use case and our AI agent will call you and run it live, then answer anything you want to ask. The fastest way to judge it is to hear it.
demo.note: We'll call within ~30 seconds. The call takes about 2 minutes.

form.agreementText: I agree to receive a one-time automated call from CortexCraft for this demo, and to the privacy policy.

testimonial.quote: Cortex Voiz answered 30,000 patient calls in the first month and booked 41% of them without a single human picking up.
testimonial.author: Surya
testimonial.statLabel: of inbound appointments booked fully autonomously, day one.

ctaSection.heading: Ready to see it in your workflow?
ctaSection.description: Tell us the operation you want to automate and we'll show you the product that fits — running on your scenario.

offices.name: India

hero.heading: Cortex Insight: Conversational Market Research At Global Scale
hero.description: Cortex Insight automates market research with AI. Conduct interviews, synthesize insights, and deploy inside your stack in days.

problemSection.label: The Problem
problemSection.heading: Why Cortex Voiz Exists?
problemSection.subtitle: Manual phone handling is costly, doesn't scale, and ties up your best people.
problemSection.body: Every incoming call needs a human. Every outbound campaign requires a team. With Cortex Voiz, create intelligent voice agents that handle both — inbound support, outbound sales, appointment scheduling, and more — without building telephony infrastructure from scratch.
problemSection.demoCaption: Watch the 2-min demo — no form needed

cta.heading: Ready to automate your calls?
cta.description: Book a 15-minute live call and hear Cortex Voiz run on your own scenario.

items.title: Intelligent Inbound & Outbound Calling
items.description: Cortex Voiz handles both incoming customer calls and outbound campaigns on the same agent. For inbound, the agent answers immediately, routes to humans if needed, and logs every interaction. For outbound, it dials numbers, handles objections, qualifies leads, and books meetings.
bullets: Works with your VOIP / SIP phone numbers

items.title: Healthcare
items.description: Appointment lines ring constantly. Voiz answers, checks availability, books, and confirms instantly.

items.title: Financial Services
items.description: Support volume spikes unpredictably. AI takes routine calls; humans take the complex ones.

items.title: Contact Centres
items.description: Use AI for first-pass handling and reserve people for hard cases, cutting handle time.

items.title: Retail & E-commerce
items.description: Order status and returns handled automatically, with feedback captured on the call.

items.title: Real Estate
items.description: Outbound follow-up qualifies leads, schedules showings, and answers property questions 24/7.

items.title: Education
items.description: Admissions lines answered at scale — questions handled, materials sent, tours booked.

cta.heading: What to use Cortex Voiz in a different sector?
cta.description: Contact us to get a personalised demo of Cortex Voiz for your specific domain.

demo.label: Test It Yourself
demo.heading: Talk To Cortex Voiz & Test Your Own Scenario
demo.description: Pick a use case and our AI agent will call you and run it live, then answer anything you want to ask. The fastest way to judge it is to hear it.
demo.note: We'll call within ~30 seconds. The call takes about 2 minutes.

form.agreementText: I agree to receive a one-time automated call from CortexCraft for this demo, and to the privacy policy.

testimonial.quote: "Cortex Voiz answered 30,000 patient calls in the first month and booked 41% of them without a single human picking up."
testimonial.author: Surya
testimonial.statLabel: of inbound appointments booked fully autonomously, day one.

platformSection.label: Under the Hood
platformSection.heading: Built For Real-Time Conversation At Scale
platformSection.description: A streaming FastAPI pipeline moves audio to real-time speech and reasoning models, so turn-taking feels human, not robotic.

features.title: Latency
features.description: Sub-second turn-taking over a streaming WebSocket pipeline.

features.title: Orchestration
features.description: FastAPI layer streaming audio to real-time speech and reasoning models.

features.title: Languages
features.description: Multi-language with native accent recognition and dialect handling.

features.title: Scale
features.description: Hundreds of simultaneous calls without degradation.

features.title: Security
features.description: Encrypted in transit and at rest, with full call audit logs.

features.title: Data Residency
features.description: Choose where call data and recordings are stored.
